Name: Livestock Auctioneering
Description: Nationwide livestock auctions and liaison transactions supported by fixed-auction points, branch offices, and biosecurity-focused facilities.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: BKB Livestock & Auctioneering
Sources.note: BKB says the division covers all of South Africa with 11 branch offices, 57 fixed-auction points, and daily auctions across the country.

Name: Grain Storage & Handling
Description: Depot-based grain storage and handling for producers operating in South Africa's major grain-producing regions.

Sources.title: BKB GrainCo Storage
Sources.note: GrainCo says it has strategically located depots across South Africa's major grain-producing regions and handles more than 300,000 tons annually.

Name: Agricultural Bulk Transport
Description: Bulk and agricultural transport support for moving farm inputs and commodities between production points and markets.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: AFGRI Logistics
Sources.note: AFGRI describes its logistics business as a nationwide provider of agricultural and bulk transport services.

Name: Farmer Development Support
Description: Training and development programmes aimed at building operational capability across farming businesses.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: AFGRI Farmer Development
Sources.note: AFGRI lists farmer development among its agribusiness solutions and describes the offering as cutting-edge training and development programmes.
